name: test_flask_access_logs_have_trace_correlation
description:
arrange: deploy Flask and Tempo, and relate tracing.
    act: send requests to Flask root endpoint.
    assert: gunicorn access logs include traceId and spanId.
descriptionHtml:
arrange: deploy Flask and Tempo, and relate tracing.
act: send requests to Flask root endpoint.
assert: gunicorn access logs include traceId and spanId.
